title: Cryptool migrates to faster infrastructure across test, staging and production
content_html:
Cryptool is migrating all environments, test, staging and production, to a faster set of underlying infrastructure, with platform upgrades layered on top.

While the migration is running, the new environment is open for testing on the public testnet at qa.cryptool.io. Step-by-step guides for users, group admins and the testnet itself are linked in the cryptool.io documentation.

When the migration completes, expect a clear improvement in page load time and overall responsiveness across the platform.
author: Cryptool
